ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patent_statistics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "patent_families" INTEGER /* Total number of patent families */,
  "avg_cites_to_papers" REAL /* Average number of citations to papers per patent family */,
  "avg_refs_in_patents" REAL /* Average number of references in patents per patent family */,
  "gdp_weighted_cites" REAL /* Average number of citations to papers with GDP-based weighting */,
  "fractional_gdp_weighted_cites" REAL /* Average number of citations to papers with fractional GDP-based weighting */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations to papers from all patent families */,
  "total_patents" INTEGER /* Total number of patents across all families */,
  "total_citations_weighted_by_gdp" REAL /* Total citations to papers with GDP-based weighting */,
  "total_citations_fractional_weighted_by_gdp" REAL /* Total citations to papers with fractional GDP-based weighting */,
  "total_references" INTEGER /* Total number of references in all patents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_families" (
  "patent_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent family */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the patent family was recorded */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of patents in the family */,
  "main_patent_id" INTEGER /* Main patent identifier in the family */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country where the patent family was filed */,
  "technology_field" TEXT /* Field of technology the patent family belongs to */,
  "inventor_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of inventor IDs */,
  "filing_countries" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of countries where the patents in the family were filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_families_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES patent_statistics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "patent_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patent family */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the patent application was filed */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was granted */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the patent has */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country where the patent was filed */,
  "technology_field" TEXT /* Field of technology the patent belongs to */,
  "inventor_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of inventor IDs */,
  "grant_status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of patent application */,
  "international_classification" TEXT /* International Patent Classification (IPC) codes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_patent_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_family_id") REFERENCES patent_families ("patent_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent making the citation */,
  "cited_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited paper */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or relevance of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scientific paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was published */,
  "author_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of author IDs */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_author_ids FOREIGN KEY ("author_ids") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Field of research the author specializes in */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_year" INTEGER /* Year for which GDP data is recorded */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the GDP data */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* GDP value for the year and country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_year", "country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., patent statistics, citation data) */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Details of the query performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who holds the subscription */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription renewal */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the most recent payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription associated with the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, invoice) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the ticket */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was submitted */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent assigned to the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
